definition:
προ-μοέω, -ῶ and depon. -έομαι, οῦμαι, 
 [in LXX: Dan LXX 11:37 (בִּין), Wis.6:7, al. ;] 
  1. to foresee. 
   2. to provide (RV, take thought for): with accusative of thing(s), καλά, Rom.12:17 (-ούμενοι), 2Co.8:21 (-οῦμεν). 
   3. to provide for (before περί, Wis, l.with): with genitive of person(s), 1Ti.5:8 (-εῖ, WH, mg., -εῖται).†
 (AS)
